title: Turn the Ship Around!
subtitle: A True Story of Turning Followers into Leaders
author: L. David Marquet
themes: Intent-Based Leadership as an operating system
Empowerment through knowledge transfer and control release
Cognitive overload and the limits of command
Creating a culture of critical thinking over compliance
Control paradox: taking control means letting go
awards: Inc. Magazine Best Business Book of 2012
Amazon Best Leadership Book of All Time (2016)
Featured on The Tim Ferriss Show
Required reading at West Point, Annapolis, and Naval War College
excerpt: The most powerful leadership tool is the leader's tongue. How you speak — and what you say — determines whether your people think or just follow orders that will ultimately fail.
